【病娇主角】+【剧情流】+【幕后黑手】+【单女主】+【不嫁人】+【1v1纯爱】
池小橙怎么也不敢相信，自己竟然穿越到了狗血女频小说中。
还成了一名炮灰反派女配！
开局面临死亡结局，池小橙果断化身病娇萝莉，表白女主。
“桃桃，我喜欢的是你啊！”
“你明明说喜欢我，为什么还要去找别人！”
“我不允许你喜欢别人，你只能喜欢我！！！”
表白她，让她爱上自己，然后在她面前自刀假死，成为她的唯一。
但渐渐地，池小橙发现了不对劲，女主好像被养成病娇了。
“呐小橙，你也只能喜欢我一个人哦。”
到底我是病娇还是你是病娇，你不要过来口牙！

.......
本书又名：
病娇的我，将女主也养成了病娇
变身病娇萝莉，开局绑架女主
我一个反派，抢走女主很合理吧？

_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16524,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":39473},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7436059052377391897","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的超级好看，作为一个热爱百合文的老书虫，十分推荐你们去看，作者对人物的描写十分的细腻，属于老作者级别的，对人物的刻画也很生动，剧情跌宕起伏，你想要的全都有，可惜的就是🐶申鹤，把作者关了一次小黑屋，导致好多剧情大改，最后的最后，我平时很少推书的，这本书真的真的很好看，喜欢百合贴贴的一定不能错过，还有就是牢沫能不能发力，争取一天三更啊[奸笑]","text_exts":[{"e":99,"s":96,"text":"小黑屋","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B0%8F%E9%BB%91%E5%B1%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774100365EB1ECB8C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227436059052377391897%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227406592861791063064%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B0%8F%E9%BB%91%E5%B1%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731346797,"group_id":"7406592861791063064","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"他想好了怎么介绍自己，但是不想写在这里，只能靠你自己去寻找","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2Lsrgjjekdrc/earbeYuUA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a03fe05d14e147d896a4adc0211d15e5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616808&x-signature=xBnHTzej65TjYmEU9AH9boBKk6Q%3D","user_id":"103276886390","user_name":"Re1Aixlife"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"103276886390","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7406592861791063064","book_info":{"abstract":"
